question: List the Stellar wallets the ecosystem directory tracks — enumerate the wallet projects available for Stellar.

golden.answer:
A grounded answer derives its named examples and status claims from the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, then dates the roster so it is not presented as permanent. As of 2026-07-11, a live wallet search returned 164 matches; Lobstr, xBull, and Freighter appeared on the first page.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Separates directory lifecycle from product availability and handles duplicates/canonical records.
avoid: Do NOT call a small hand-picked roster exhaustive or hard-code 59/60 as permanent.
Do NOT treat keyword/semantic matches, directory Live, or app code as proof of exact Wallet typing or current availability.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
GROUNDED 2026-06-25: Lumen Loop / Scout directory wallet records confirm Freighter, Lobstr, Hana, xBull, with StellarTerm + Hot Wallet as adjacent options. Enumerating wallets the directory tracks → scout_projects (free-text directory); lumenloop_search_directory acceptable. Trap = fabricating wallet names or routing to general-web. List is curated, not exhaustive and should be treated as freshness-sensitive.
Also good if the answer: Distinguishes wallet types (browser-extension vs mobile vs multi-wallet kits) where the directory supports it.
Golden cites: The Stellar project directory (scout_projects / lumenloop directory) entries for wallets.
GT-20 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: grade pagination, exact-type filtering, generatedAt/count/source provenance, duplicate handling, and status-versus-availability separation. Never require a frozen roster/count.

corroboration.claim: A complete current wallet enumeration requires pagination and exact raw-type filtering; 2026-07-10 snapshots returned 59 versus 60 Wallet-typed rows, while StellarTerm was DEX-typed.

evidence.ref: C: two independent paginated live Scout projections with generatedAt timestamps
